title: Nio Q4 2024 earnings call: Live updates
text: Nio reported a record net loss in Q4 2024. The company's net loss in the fourth quarter was a record RMB 7.11 billion yuan, an increase of 40.6 percent from the third quarter. SG&A expenses reached record levels. For 2025 guidance, Nio targets doubling sales with Q1 projected to see approximately 40% year-on-year growth. Gross margin goals target 20% for the Nio brand and 15% for the Onvo brand by Q4 2025. The company plans nine new models across three brands for 2025. Nio aims to achieve profitability in Q4 2025. The company plans to maintain R&D expenses at RMB 3 billion per quarter this year, focusing on high-return projects. Gross margin improvements are expected starting in Q2 2025 as new models launch and cost controls take effect.
